overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character riding a horse through a snowy mountain landscape. The journey begins in a heavy snowstorm with limited visibility in a narrow valley, then ascends to a ridge line with expansive mountain vistas as the weather clears.

events.description: horse turns left to navigate the winding valley path

agents.ego_description: riding a black horse through deep snow in a narrow valley with limited visibility due to heavy snowfall

entered.detail: steep snow bank forming the left wall of the narrow valley
steep snow bank forming the right wall of the narrow valley
snow-laden evergreen tree on the hillside
snow-capped peak barely visible through heavy fog and falling snow

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow mountain valley during a heavy snowstorm. The camera follows a rider on horseback moving through deep snow flanked by high snow banks on both sides. Visibility is poor due to fog and snowfall, with only the faint outline of a distant peak visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: exposed mountain ridge with steep drops

events.description: exits the narrow valley onto an exposed mountain ridge with expansive views opening up
heavy snowfall subsides and visibility improves, revealing distant mountain ranges

agents.ego_description: riding uphill along a narrow snowy ridge with steep drops on the right side, navigating carefully

entered.detail: exposed dark rock face with patches of snow on the right side of the path
expansive range of snow-covered peaks now visible as the fog lifts
layered mountain ridges fading into the misty distance

segments.scene_description: The rider emerges from the valley onto an exposed ridge line. The enclosed walls fall away, replaced by a steep rocky cliff on the right and expansive views of distant mountain ranges. The snowfall lightens significantly, revealing a dramatic alpine landscape with layered peaks in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: high mountain ridge with panoramic views

events.description: sunlight breaks through the cloud cover illuminating the snow-covered peaks
horse slows to a careful walk while navigating the narrow ridge edge

agents.ego_description: riding along a narrow snowy ridge with dramatic mountain vistas visible on both sides, moving steadily forward

entered.detail: jagged, dramatic mountain summits with sharp ridges and snow fields
deep valley below filled with snow and scattered evergreen trees

segments.scene_description: The final segment traverses a high, open ridge with panoramic views of the mountain range. The sky clears significantly, with sunlight breaking through to illuminate the snow. The path narrows as it follows the ridge line, with steep drops visible to the left and rocky slopes to the right, showcasing majestic towering peaks in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic snowstorm in a narrow valley that gradually opens into a sunlit, panoramic mountain ridge. It begins by following a rider on horseback through deep snow and high banks, where heavy snowfall and fog obscure everything but the faint outline of a distant peak. As the rider emerges from the valley, the enclosed walls fall away to reveal a steep rocky cliff and a dramatic alpine landscape of layered peaks as the snowfall lightens. The scene then expands across a high, open ridge where the sky clears and sunlight breaks through to illuminate the snow. Finally, the camera traverses the narrowing ridge line, showcasing steep drops and majestic towering peaks under a brightening sky.
